JUDGE DESMOND, P.DOWLING/CSR, K.LEE/CLERK 02:05PM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ARNOLD EVJE FOR THE PLTF AND ROBERT BORTON FOR THE DEFT. CASE IS SETTLED. TERMS ON THE RECORD.

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 01, MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE, TO ALLOW DEFTS. TO AMEND THEI, CALENDAR OF JAN-21-1997, DENIED MOTION TO CONTINUE IS DENIED; NO GOOD CAUSE. MOTION TO REQUEST JURY IS DENIED; UNTIMELY. MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT IS DENIED W/OUT PREJUDICE TO RENEW DURING COURT TRIAL TO AMEND TO PROOF. TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPT 5.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATTERSON, ANDRE PATTERSON, LYNETTE AKA MABEL COHEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 226 6TH STREET, S.F. $1,273.09 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,273.09, STAYED UNTIL FEB-25-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, AT 5:00PM. IF DEFT VACATES ON TIME, THEN PLTF SHALL WAIVE MONETARY DAMAGES. DEFT ANDRE PATTERSON SHALL DISMISS THE S.F. RENT BOARD #R00453T. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY'S FEES. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
